Mamma Mia: Here We Go Again! (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $120,634,935Details
International Box Office $275,508,396
Worldwide Box Office $396,143,331
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $10,650,398
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $10,982,311
Total $21,632,709
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Ten years after Mamma Mia! you’re invited to return to the magical Greek island of Kalokairi in an all-new original musical based on the songs of ABBA.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$34,952,180 (29.0% of total gross)
Legs:3.45 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:30.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$75,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.3 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,317 opening theaters/3,514 max. theaters, 5.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $158,374,739

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 20th, 2018 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: July 18th, 2018 (Wide) (Egypt)
July 18th, 2018 (Wide) (Philippines)
July 18th, 2018 (Wide) (Belgium)
July 19th, 2018 (Wide) (Albania)
July 19th, 2018 (Wide) (Israel)
Video Release: October 23rd, 2018 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some suggestive material
(Rating bulletin 2518 (Cert #51518), 3/14/2018)
Running Time: 114 minutes
Franchise: Mamma Mia
Cast, crew, or production detail: Ensemble, Legacy Sequel, Prequel
Film format: IMAX: DMR

Subgenre: Jukebox Musical
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Musical
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Playtone, Universal Pictures, Littlestar, Legendary Pictures, Perfect World Pictures
Production Countries: United States, United Kingdom, Sweden
Languages: English
